text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Shuka Sho, and the massive
crowd gathered at Kyoto Racecourse has their
attention on Fine Motion.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
You can do it, Fine Motion!
Do your best out there!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: There are so many people cheering me on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The weight of all those expectations might be
enough to crush someone else, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After all, the fact they're looking is precisely what
gives shape to me as "Fine Motion."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her mental fortitude has always turned those
expectations into strength. I assume she won't
have any problems today either. However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurry after her and find her standing alone. By
the look on her face, she seems to be holding
something back.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, I think so. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Look, I just can't keep this grin off my
face!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Argh! Compose yourself, Fine! You must smile
elegantly when in front of everyone!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I keep this up, Shakur is going to call me a
grinning fool or something!
choice_data_list: Uhhh, so what exactly are you worried about?
Uhhh, so what exactly are you worried about?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That I'll disappoint the audience, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to this race so much I'm liable
to run with gleeful abandon. I'll be just like Wild!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wild is a dog I used to have. He was very
naughty, so we called him "Wild"!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure all the spectators are hoping to see me
run elegantly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I need to keep my feelings in check or I'll be
bounding around like Wild...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm. Does that make me a bit strange?
choice_data_list: You're not worried about the race itself?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Not at all! I'm very much looking forward to it.
choice_data_list: Then you should run however you want.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But if I look different than how everyone
expects—
choice_data_list:
It's fine. You're already showing them what they
want to see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pardon?!
choice_data_list:
All everyone wants to see is you enjoying
yourself.

All everyone wants to see is you enjoying
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...It is?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The way Fine Motion runs is... Well, it's pretty
impressive, right?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Fine Motion!
You were wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everywhere Fine Motion goes, she captures the
hearts of spectators and helps people find their
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Their dreams...

text_block_list.name: Formerly Trembling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But I was drawn in by how you ran, and I started
to enjoy it myself. I'm going to do my best to feel
that way again!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was the only one getting anything...
but I can give something to others when I run as
well.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Then, I'm going to have as much fun as
I can today!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run as hard as I can, and experience
that wonderful view with everyone!
